description: Installs OBS Studio via Chocolatey and/or syncs bundled settings. Supports 3 modes.

messages.notAdmin: This script requires admin privileges. Please run as Administrator.
messages.notFound: OBS Studio not found -- will install now
messages.syncingSettings: Extracting {zip} to temp and syncing scenes + profiles...
messages.settingsSkipped: No OBS settings bundle found in script folder -- skipping sync
messages.disabled: OBS Studio install is disabled in config
messages.exportNoSource: OBS data directory not found -- has OBS been launched at least once?
messages.exportNoFiles: No scene collections or profiles found -- nothing to export
messages.exportComplete: OBS settings exported -- {count} item(s) saved to {path}
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.install+settings: Install OBS Studio and sync settings (default)
commands.install-only: Install OBS Studio only (no settings sync)
commands.export: Export OBS settings from machine to repo for backup
commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
